description: Hermes Agent Platform — evaluation configuration for agents-cli eval run

tool_trajectory_avg_score.description: Average score for correct tool selection and call sequence

rubric_based_final_response_quality_v1.description: LLM-as-judge rubric scoring of final response quality

hallucinations_v1.description: Detect factual claims not grounded in context or tools

evalsets.description: Analytics agent — BigQuery, reporting, KPI queries
Developer agent — code review, debugging, project structure
Task agent — multi-agent orchestration and delegation

notes: agents-cli eval run requires GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT and ADC to be set
Use --dry-run flag locally to run offline without GCP credentials
LLM-as-judge metrics require a live Gemini API endpoint
